basic_details.job_title: NSTI Ludhiana Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Skill Training Institute Ludhiana has released the official Guest Faculties Notification 2026 on 10 July 2026 at its official portal. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced under the NSTI Ludhiana Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged as per the prescribed norms with qualifications such as B.Tech with CITS and 1 year experience, Diploma with CITS and 2 years experience, or ITI with CITS and 3 years experience can apply through email mode until 10 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech with CITS and 1 year experience, or Diploma with CITS and 2 years experience, or ITI with CITS and 3 years experience.
qualification.details: All Posts: B.Tech with CITS and 1 year of experience Diploma with CITS and 2 years of experience ITI with CITS certificate and 3 years of experience

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 250/hour for CITS, Rs. 200/hour for CTS, maximum Rs. 30,000/month.
salary_details.details: For CITS posts: Rs.250/- per hour For CTS posts: Rs. 200/- per hour Maximum emolument: Rs.30,000/- during any calendar month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NSTI Ludhiana Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NSTI Ludhiana Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NSTI Ludhiana Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NSTI Ludhiana Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NSTI Ludhiana Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NSTI Ludhiana Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the Guest Faculties posts at NSTI Ludhiana is 10 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications are sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NSTI Ludhiana Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculties posts in various trades like Computer Software Applications, Electrician, Fitter, and others at NSTI Ludhiana.

faq.question: Q3. What are the eligibility criteria for Guest Faculties posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech with CITS and 1 year experience, or Diploma with CITS and 2 years experience, or ITI with CITS and 3 years experience to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Guest Faculties at NSTI Ludhiana?
faq.answer: Guest Faculties for CITS posts will receive Rs. 250 per hour, while CTS posts will get Rs. 200 per hour. The maximum emolument in any calendar month is capped at Rs. 30,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for NSTI Ludhiana Guest Faculties?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Guest Faculties posts is entirely through email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculties at NSTI Ludhiana involves a written test followed by a skill test. Candidates will be evaluated based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the NSTI Ludhiana Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for Guest Faculties?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculties positions at National Skill Training Institute Ludhiana are temporary. These roles are for conducting classes for CITS/CTS trainees for a period of three months.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for NSTI Ludhiana Guest Faculties?
faq.answer: The job location for the Guest Faculties posts is National Skill Training Institute, Ludhiana, Punjab. Selected candidates will be working in Ludhiana city.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for NSTI Ludhiana?
faq.answer: The official website for National Skill Training Institute Ludhiana is not provided in the extracted data. Candidates should refer to the official notification for more details or search online.
